mapper.insert: insert into auction_bid_record ( event_id, request_id, room_id, user_id, nickname, amount, bid_version, bid_time ) values ( #{eventId}, #{requestId}, #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{nickname}, #{amount}, #{bidVersion}, #{bidTime} )
mapper.select: select user_id as userId, max(nickname) as nickname, max(amount) as amount, max(bid_time) as latestBidTime from auction_bid_record where room_id = #{roomId} group by user_id order by amount desc, latestBidTime asc limit #{limit}
